drills.name: Reaction Save Drill
drills.instructions: GK in set position. Partner shoots from 8 m with minimal wind-up. 20 saves each side.
drills.coach_tip: Stay on balls of feet. Watch the ball, not the shooter's body.

drills.name: Diving Range Extension
drills.instructions: Cones placed 1.5 m each side of GK. Partner rolls ball to cone — GK dives to save. 15 each side.
drills.coach_tip: Drive your lead knee outward as you dive for extra reach.
drills.progression: Extend cones to 2 m. Add height variation.
